text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Mejiro Ardan have come
to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, she stands as a central figure of
the era, poised at the cutting edge of history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as long as she has her cherished rivals, she'll
keep on going, well into the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the constellation of tracks she leaves
behind, those who look upon her must see a
brilliant, shimmering river...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Might I ask you to join me for a while?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my day off and Mejiro Ardan has appeared at
my door. She makes this sudden request without
breaking eye contact...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That's a secret.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There's a car waiting out front. Please come out
once you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no idea what's going on, I hastily gather my
things before heading off with Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The view here is spectacular regardless of when
one visits. It's ever so calming.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's nanny has driven us to a small hill
near the Mejiro family's rest house.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Do you remember this spot, Trainer?
choice_data_list: This is where I showed you the road map, right?
This is where I showed you the road map, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's where you first indicated my path to the
future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's where the person I am now got her start.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
My lady. Everything's ready now, so I'll begin
unpacking over here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Nanny.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Would you allow me to paint a picture of you,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, a picture.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...As we've walked this path together over the
past three years, you've given me a great many
things, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And every single one has become a precious
memory that I intend to hold onto tightly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Which is what made me realize that I'd quite like
something physical to immortalize our time
together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The idea that came to mind... was something I
used to do to pass the hours while in the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That feeling I had when you showed me the future
here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And the way I feel right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I want to capture those feelings here, in a picture.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Would you... be willing to grant me this selfish
request?
choice_data_list: I should probably strike a pose first, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Then, I may proceed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan treasures whatever it is she most
wants to do in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's something I swore to respect during our
three years together. Why would I reject it now?
choice_data_list: I am your trainer, after all.
I am your trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wonder just how many times those words have been a
pillar of strength for me since we've met...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Since all the materials are here, why not paint
something yourself, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us paint each other, then swap once
we're finished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The picture Mejiro Ardan paints is so sublime and
mystifying I can hardly believe it's me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for the painting I put my heart and soul into,
Mejiro Ardan says she plans to frame and hang it
up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up reminiscing about the past three
years, and the sun sets without us even realizing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Have I... left a lasting impression on you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Are things the same as they were when last you
spoke to me here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Does my future still exist... within you?
choice_data_list: You really have made an impression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that future is here, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan has made a deep impression on my
heart. It's there right now, and it'll be there for as
long as I live.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when I'm gone, the trail of light tracing
Mejiro Ardan's path will surely illuminate the
future for generations to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. In my eyes, Mejiro Ardan has always
been...
choice_data_list: To me, your light is eternal.
To me, your light is eternal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That's unfair.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that would make me the only one who's
going to last until the end of time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I dislike that notion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Which is why...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall shape both your present and your future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Just as you have for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So long as I draw breath, I shall continue to carve
out your path.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If I am eternal in your eyes, and I trace each of
your moments, now and forever...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Then, surely...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: They'll form an eternity, for the two of us alone.
